Hey Josh, 

Understand re: NFM but I'd advocate giving it a go for this year with Our Throsby on board - I'm trying to link all our venues with the idea of a seafood plate date to piggyback off our Festival the month before.

I'm just negotiating a full page ad for us too to entice people to the Creek.

Would love to discuss the Seafood Festival more! Keen to know what the dish is! I can pop in next Wednesday 21 if that work for you?

Cheers,

Sarah.

Hey Sarah! Thanks for reaching out. 

We ran the plate date last year and it didnât really take off at our venue so weâre probably going to skip NFM this year. 

We are very keen to be a part of the Throsby seafood festival though! I have just the dish lined up to showcase our fabulous waterway! 

Josh

Howdy neighbour! 

We are encouraging Throsby venues to take advantage of Newcastle Food Month's "Plate Date" in April - a meal and beverage for $25 or $30 per person.

Examples include breakfast with coffee for $25, or a lunch/dinner dish paired with a glass of wine or beer for $30. 

On the back of March's Throsby Seafood Festival (which I'm currently organising), we're asking the plate date to be a seafood dish if possible. 

As a bonus for being a Throsby participant, we have been given access to the marketing etc for $150 (instead of $300). 

If you're keen, jump on this message or give me a call - registrations close this Thursday 15 Jan. 

Happy to support you in any way to make this a no-brainer!

Cheers,
Sarah: 0401 958 923
